prompt: The shard tallier is haunted. Same input, different totals every run — yesterday `error` counted 1597, then 1601, then the right number. Worse, roughly one ingest run in ten the whole process just dies mid-aggregation. Single-shard inputs never misbehave, only multi-shard ones. `go test -race -timeout 30s ./...` fails immediately on this package, so whatever it is, it's reproducible here. Please fix tally.go — keep the parallel-per-shard design, we need the throughput — and get the race build green. tally_test.go stays untouched.
